mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM eb_admin t WHERE t.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.avatar, a.phone, a.job, MAX(j.name) AS jobName, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT f.name ORDER BY f.id SEPARATOR ',') AS frameNames FROM eb_admin a INNER JOIN eb_frame_assist fa ON fa.user_id = a.id AND fa.entid = #{entid} AND fa.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN eb_frame f ON f.id = fa.frame_id AND f.deleted_at IS NULL LEFT JOIN eb_rank_job j ON j.id = a.job AND j.entid = #{entid} WHERE a.deleted_at IS NULL
AND a.status = #{status}
AND a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.avatar, a.phone, a.job ORDER BY MAX(fa.is_admin) DESC, MAX(fa.is_mastart) DESC, a.id ASC

SELECT a.id, a.uid, a.name, a.phone, a.avatar, a.status, a.job, i.sex, i.education, i.is_part AS isPart, i.type, i.interview_position AS interviewPosition, i.work_time AS workTime, i.quit_time AS quitTime, i.formal_time AS formalTime, i.interview_date AS interviewDate, i.sort, i.created_at AS infoCreatedAt
ORDER BY i.quit_time DESC, i.created_at DESC, a.id DESC
ORDER BY (i.sort IS NULL), i.sort ASC, a.id ASC
LIMIT #{q.limit} OFFSET #{q.offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT a.id
GROUP BY a.id ) x

SELECT a.id
GROUP BY a.id, a.is_admin ORDER BY a.is_admin DESC, MAX(fa.is_admin) DESC, a.id ASC LIMIT #{p.limit} OFFSET #{p.offset}
